_docstring.description: Linear task template for Barton Doctrine compliance
_docstring.usage: Use this template when creating tasks in Linear via Composio

template.name: Barton Doctrine Task
template.description_template:
## Task Overview

[Brief description]

## Doctrine References

- **IMO Phase**: {{imo_phase}}
- **CTB Layer**: {{ctb_layer}}
- **Altitude Level**: {{altitude_level}}

## Related Docs

- [IMO Definition](/docs/10-imo.md)
- [CTB Layer Doc](/docs/20-ctb-{{ctb_layer}}.md)
- [Altitude Doc](/docs/altitude/{{altitude_level}}.md)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Code is in correct CTB layer (`src/{{ctb_layer}}/`)
- [ ] Tests added in `tests/{{ctb_layer}}/`
- [ ] Kill switch defined for failure cases
- [ ] Sidecar events emitted for observability
- [ ] HEIR ID format used for any new IDs

## Kill Switch

On failure, this task should:
- [ ] Return error response
- [ ] Trigger fallback
- [ ] Write to DLQ
- [ ] Alert (specify channel)

actions.rule: PR merged to correct branch pattern

actions.message: Task {{task_id}} completed - update docs if needed
